violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in cooler in back room and the tops of the chest freezers were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Cups were found stored on the floor in the hall. Single-use items should be stored off of the floor.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Flooring is not easily cleanable due to gaps in floor pieces. Floors should be smooth to allow them to be easily cleaned. Floor also found dirty/sticky in prep area. Floor should be cleaned and maintained clean. Baseboards found missing in storage area. Floors and walls should be properly maintained.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Food employee with long hair found not adequately restrained. Long hair should be properly restrained.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The front of the ice machine was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items found stored on the floor of the back room. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Flooring in the back room is not smooth, and easily cleanable due to gaps in flooring. Flooring should be maintained smooth and easily cleanable.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee coat was found on food storage shelving in the back room. Personal items should be stored separate from food service items.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
